nasb.text: And Jehoahaz slept with his fathers, and they buried him in Samaria; and Joash his son became king in his place.

esv.text: So Jehoahaz slept with his fathers, and they buried him in Samaria, and Joash his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約哈斯和他的祖先一同長眠，葬在撒瑪利亞。他的兒子約阿施接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约哈斯与祖先同眠后，葬在撒玛利亚。他儿子约阿施继位。
